segments.text: Good evening.

segments.text: Here with them in Cardiff are Audience, who've been chosen by the pollsters Savanta Comres, who recruited people from all backgrounds and all parts of the UK who support each of these seven parties.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: But politics makes real change happen.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: Labour made the NHS happen.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: We made the minimum wage and Sure Start happen.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: We'll make the Green Industrial Revolution happen.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: A vote for Labour is a vote for hope.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: For a government that supports you and invests in your community.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: A government that is on your side.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: So let's transform our country so that it works for everyone.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: Vote Labour on the 12th of December.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: Thank you very much indeed.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: And next, the First Minister of Scotland, Nicola Sturgeon, the leader of the SNP.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: Boris Johnson's Tories are unfit for office, in my opinion.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: But unless people vote to keep them out, we could be stuck with them and their policies for years to come, with dire consequences for our economy and public services, especially the NHS.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: In Scotland, the SNP is the main challenger in every single Tory-held seat.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: So I vote for the SNP on December the 12th as I vote to lock Boris Johnson out of Downing Street, provide an escape route from the mess of Brexit and to put Scotland's future into Scotland's hands so that we can build a better, fairer country.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: Thank you very much indeed.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: Next to the leader of Plaid Cymru, Adam Price.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: On the 13th of December, my 84-year-old father may wake up for the 11th time in his life to a Tory government he, like the majority here, old miner that he is, has never voted for.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_15

segments.text: He stopped voting Labour 2 some years ago because he realised that change will only ever come when Wales finds its voice.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_15

segments.text: I really hope this is that moment for my father's generation, for my son's generation, for all our generations.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_15

segments.text: Because it's when we find our voice that we will change this nation, that Wales will build a future that is better than our past.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_15

segments.text: Thank you very much indeed.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: Now to the leader of the Liberal Democrat Party, Jo Swinson.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: As you sit on your sofa with your cup of tea, watching this election unfold, you might be thinking, surely we deserve better than this depressing duo of Boris Johnson and Jeremy Corbyn.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_06

segments.text: Boris Johnson, caught lying again and again.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_06

segments.text: He thinks the rules don't apply to him.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_06

segments.text: And frankly, he only cares about himself.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_06

segments.text: He doesn't deserve to win a majority and the Liberal Democrats can stop him.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_06

segments.text: You have the power to stop Brexit and create a brighter future.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_06

segments.text: Vote Liberal Democrat.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_06

segments.text: Thank you.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: For the Conservatives, the Chief Secretary to the Treasury, Rishi Sunak.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: This is the choice you have.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_12

segments.text: Boris Johnson, delivering Brexit in weeks and focusing on the NHS, schools and police.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_12

segments.text: Or Jeremy Corbyn, ridiculously stuck in neutral on one of the biggest questions our country has ever faced.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_12

segments.text: Only the Conservatives can break this deadlock and set Britain free.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_12

segments.text: Thank you very much indeed.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: Now to the Chairman of the Brexit Party, Richard Tice.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: Brexit done right is an amazing opportunity.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_14

segments.text: Let's go for it with ambition, with energy.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_14

segments.text: Lower prices, higher wages, training our own people, building roads and rail projects all over the country.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_14

segments.text: But make your vote count to get Brexit and stop Corbyn bankrupting the country.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_14

segments.text: Only the Brexit Party can take on Labour in seats Tories have not won in decades.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_14

segments.text: Together, let's change politics for good.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_14

segments.text: Thank you very much.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: And finally tonight, Caroline Lucas of the Green Party.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: This is the most important general election in generations.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11

segments.text: The last chance to remain in the EU and transform Britain.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11

segments.text: The very last chance to prevent runaway climate chaos.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11

segments.text: A half of all voters say that climate breakdown will influence their choice on December the 12th.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11

segments.text: Voting with them is the only way to get more Green MPs and to keep up the pressure.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11

segments.text: So if you've ever thought about voting Green, do it.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11
